titleStmt.title: Stone Urn found near Hpayahtaung Pagoda, Sriksetra

licence.p: This work is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 Unported Licence. To view a copy of the licence, visit https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/ or send a letter to Creative Commons, 444 Castro Street, Suite 900, Mountain View, California, 94041, USA.

projectDesc.p: The project DHARMA has received funding from the European Research Council (ERC) under the European Union's Horizon 2020 research and innovation programme (grant agreement no 809994).

prefixDef.p: Public URIs with the prefix bib to point to a Zotero Group Library named ERC-DHARMA whose data are open to the public.
Internal URIs using the part prefix to point to person elements in the DHARMA_idListMembers_v01.xml file.

div.ab:
1 siddham· 2.°asama ḅa tgim·ṁ tnay· pin·ṁḥ ton·ḥ tiṁ pṅauy· plat·ṁ tir·ṁ kun·ḥ truk· thay·ḥ ḅa ncum·ḥ tkar·ṁḥ psuy·ḥ ḅa knaṅ· dik·ṃṁ nmat· goy· kdlik·ṁ tiṁ gaṃ psuy·ḥ tiṁ kdiṅ·ṁ barami °o thmin·ḥ kyiṁ ta kḅoṅ·ḥ tiṁ nga mahagaruṇa tiṁ kyan·ṁ ktoy· pin·ṁḥ °o piṁ thraḥ ma diṃṁ kdluḥ tiṁ pra tiṁ hna ṅuḥ kto tiṁ gaṁ vaṃ bi ka bar· ta kdan·ṁ khyaṃ tin·ṁ viṃṁ lo nhoḥ °o ḥ kvi ḅūdha ḅay·ṁḥ kda tu tda ḥ rya [s]da saḥ tliṅ· saṅ·gha ḅa[y·]ṁḥ kviṃṁ °o ḅin·ṁḥ ray· pir·ṁ hnam· °o hnaut· tsaṁḥ tiṁ kliṁḥ duṃḥ ḅaḥ kkir· kvay· kviṃṁ °o nyaṅ· tiṁ kit·ṁḥ ḅa knuy· tyaṅ· tiṁ giḥ nhom·ḥ radaṃna ḅay·ṁḥ kviṃṁ tṅam· pin·ṁḥ din·ṃṁ pdin·ṁ ptuk· ktoy· tiṁ tdluṅ·ḥ °o pun· sri tdav·ṃḥ ḅay·ṁḥ sri °oṅ· luṅ· hip· tir·ṁ hnam· tiṁ sdin·ṁ tiṁ tdik·ṃ kviṃṁ °o nḅun·ḥ pau ḅay·ṁḥ °o ktiṅ·ṁḥ tdav·ṃḥ ḅay·ṁḥ tniṅ·ṁ °oṅ· viy·ṃṁ tir·ṁ hnam· kaṅ· sri deṃvamit·tra ḅay·ṁḥ kviṃṁ °o nḅun·ḥ pir·ṁ tum· knuy· pau ḅay·ṁḥ °o Coṅ·ḥ tdav·ṃḥ ḅay·ṁḥ tniṅ·ṁ °oṅ· luṅ· hip· tir·ṁ hnam· kaṅ· sri harivik·krama ḅay·ṁḥ hrat·ṁ tin·ṁ yaṅ· kḅoṅ·ḥ tiṁ tma ḅay·ṁḥ kviṃṁ °o
mraut· kgaṃḥ pau ḅay·ṁḥ °o ndlok· tdav·ṃḥ ḅay·ṁḥ sri °oṅ· luṅ· snuḥ siṅ·havik·krama niṁ yaḥ tiṁ kliṁḥ tiṁ pdlik·ṁ °o sdaṅ· ḅay·ṁḥ kviṃṁ °o nḅun·ḥ tin·ṁ kir·ṁḥ tgim·ṁ brahma pau ḅay·ṁḥ °o ḅaṅ· tdav·ṃḥ ḅay·ṁḥ tniṅ·ṁ °oṅ· hip· tir·ṁ hnam· kaṅ· sri suriyavik·krama ḅay·ṁḥ kviṃṁ °o va rom· ndlok· ḅay·ṁḥ °o pjauy· tok· tkoḥ pe ḅaṁḥ °o kdaṃṁ snuḥ sri brithuvik·krama niṁ yaḥ nmat· ḥ nkiṁḥ tiṁ vaṅ·ṃḥ ḅay·ṁḥ kuṅ· tin·ṁ dlin·ṁ sri jan·tranana ḅay·ṁḥ °o nmuḥ pguṃ rut· driv·ṁ kbak· tir·ṁ gan·ṃ °o pṅauy· tin·ṁ kiṁḥ haḥ pin·ṁḥ °o va ḅay·ṁḥ °o din·ṃṁ ta pay·ṁḥ hneṅ· diṃ °o diṃṁ ta pay·ṁḥ ptiṁ sdoḥ ste mgauṃḥ pū na gha dra ktoy· tin·ṁ ya °o ngam·ṃḥ tgaṃṁḥ tpoy· sdaṅ·ṃ tiṁ pder·ṃ tiṁ pdar·ṃ tiṁ dat·ṃṁ kdam·ḥ pir·ṁ ṭloḥ ṭlim·ṁ kriy·ṁḥ tiṁ ka tir·ṁ yaḥ paṅ· °o tgam·ṃ ktoy· kkiṅ·ṁ tin·ṁ yaṅ· ta kḅoṅ·ḥ tiṁ tma ta tiṁ ptir·ṁ tiṁ pṭray· ta kgin·ṃṁḥ tiṁ tnaḥ ḅut·dha ḅay·ṁḥ kviṃṁ °o co tiṁ yaḥ saṅ·gha duk·ṃ kkin·ṁ tiṁ knik·ṁ ḅa khmik· CCin· kviṁ °o nyan· Ci tdik·ṃ ḅa doṅ·ṃ ḅay·ṁḥ °o caṅ·ḥ tdav·ṃḥ tiṁ priṅ·ḥ khyaṃ viṃṁ
tgan· duk·ṃ kṅuḥ ḅay·ṁḥ bradima din·ṃṁ ta pay·ṁḥ tiṁ phlaṅ· tiṁ sban·ḥ the the tiṁḥ pauḥ pir·ṁ ṅan· hin· tko tiṁ vuṅ· kṅuṅ· hrat·ṁ sauṅ· plat·ṁ kip· viṁ °o din·ṁ ḅin·ṁḥ ṭraṅ·ḥ kdav·ṃ ḅin·ṁḥ miC·ṁ pin·ṁ dra khliṁḥ °o plaṁḥ ni khuḥ sa ma ner· tvo saṅ·gha tiṁ tman· tiṁ siṁ riḥ vaṅ·ṃ dir·ṃṁ pay·ṁḥ kkut·ṃ tiṁ pḅin·ḥ pay·ṁḥ kro tiṁ kso paṁḥ ksi ksa paṁḥ kduḥ taṁ ḥ paṁḥ tiṁ pjaC· tiṁ piC·ṁ pjaḥ °o riṁḥ kCa tiṁ gaṃ hau kla °o la da vaṁḥ phi °o diṃṁḥ ndaṁ ta pay·ṁḥ tiṁ kdlim·ṁ tiṁ kmur· °o sguṅ·ṃ kno °o dvaṃ ṭloḥ tir· den· pit·ṁ ṅat· thliḥ ṅiṁ kdaṅ· ndlom·ḥ kloḥ ḅin·ṁḥ pdin·ṃ tgun·ḥ ḅiṁḥ kdiṃṁ sgaun·ṃ ḅin·ṁḥ pṅan· rya ḅay·ṁḥ °o nḅun·ḥ kriḥ mruṅ· to toy· thṅa ta kḅiṁ ḅay·ṁḥ vaṅ·ṃ ḅin·ṁḥ ḅam·ḥ dup·ṃ pgip·ṃṁ pdaun·ṃ kdap·ṃ ṭlan· rṭlan· trom·ḥ tṅav·ḥ pa go thliḥ paṅ· raṅ·ṁḥ nu rnuṅ· thuva cetya tin·ṁ mat· kuḥ kuṅ·ḥ mūṅ·ḥ ḅin·ṁḥ mūṅ·ḥ nut· hliṁḥ kṅam· dlin·ṁ pay·ṁḥ tiṁ pgoy· tiṁ pban·ḥ don·ṃḥ kaṅ· pa ḅay·ṁḥ ngam·ṃḥ dav·ṃḥ tdav·ṃḥ to tniṃṁ °o ra hi tiṁ hna kaṅ· sri dit·ṃtyavik·krama pir·ṁ kun· toy· tkir·ṁḥ sma kliṁḥ ryaḥ kgaṃḥ tin·ṁ droḥ ktoy· tiṁ khnoṅ· kdiṃ tin·ṁ doṅ·ḥ tkin·ḥ kli tūn·ḥ dav·ṃḥ
ndik·ṃ droṅ· hra ḅay·ṁḥ rviṃṁ kdon· tiṁ tnay· stam·ṁḥ thṅam·ḥ tim·ṁ nuC· tim·ṁ Cduṅ·ḥ m· t· k r iḥ yaṁ tir·ṁ him·ṁ psuy·ḥ kni mū tyaṅ·ḥ °o yaṅ·ḥ tyaṅ·ḥ ktoy· sir·ṁ k ñ at·ṁ msauṅ· ḅiṁ goy· nmat· kdlik·ṁ daṃḥ dam·ṃḥ knuy· tiṁ thliḥ dra tiṁ priṅ·ḥ tsaḥ pir·ṁ ṅa ta kdim· tiṁ tram·ḥ kdaṅ· ksiṁ knaṅ· pyaum· mba da rar· puja da vaṃḥ mdeṅ· ga ra kdi tiṁ ma ta ma kaḥ bo ba pūja vaḥ °o hnau tiṁ priṅ·ḥ piṁḥ ca kha kgaṃḥ tiṁ °o hle hleḥ ḅa ma Co naṁ rnaṁ hṅa hṅar· tiṁ priṅ·ḥ duC·ṃ °o pa ka bi ki °o gim·ṃṁ haC· dra °o kkiC·ṁ tiṁ pin·ṁ mau thraṅ·ḥ ma vaṅ·ṃ °o paṅ· diṃ ḅa kiC·ṁ vak·ṃ tiṁ kliṁḥ tin·ṁ droḥ ca kha kteṅ·ḥ tiṁ smun· ca kha ḅiṁ ksiḥ tiṁ sba vaṅ·ṃ paṅ· tak· ḅu knan·ṁḥ tin·ṁ hraḥ ktoy· dra tir·ṁ hnam· ḅay·ṁḥ tnir· dok·ḥ ṅav· kṭlot· rom· ndlot· sdaṃ ḅay·ṁḥ kdaṅ· pḅe tin·ṁ dlin·ṁ ṅit·ṁ kdaṅ· ktiṅ·ṁḥ ndraḥ ḅay·ṁḥ paṅ· ca kha mraṅ· meruva °o tcom· nut· kgoy· ḅa khmik·ṁ knuy· rla tin·ṁ ṭroṅ·ḥ nrat·ḥ °o tbu nut· kṅam· tiṁ kvoC· kdlik·ṁ °o kūn· tin·ṁ k r i ṅraḥ ḅun·ḥ nCam·ḥ ktoy· tir·ṁ tcom· tliṅ· nut· ḅay·ṁḥ °o paṅ· ṅam· ḅoṅ·ḥ pdray· tru tiṁ kyiṁḥ kdaṅ· nhlak· ktoy· hnit·ṁ °o hnau tiṁ pden·ṃḥ tiṁ sphir· trip· saḥ mra ngaṃ
tir·ṁ van·ṃḥ van· bam·ṁḥ na tiṁ pkin·ṁ ktun·ḥ ktoy· duk·ṃ ktoy· ktoy· tin·ṁ droṃḥ tiṁ ptik·ṁ tiṁ khnoṅ· tir·ṁ mu duk· nduk· °o ngaṁ nut· ḅay·ṁḥ °o paṅ· ṅam· gin·ṃṁḥ tma ḅay·ṁḥ °o paṅ· ṅam· tdin·ṁ mdrauṅ· tgaṃḥ mliṅ· mraṅ· °o phar· nhṅin·ṁḥ nḅiṁḥ tiṁ ngak· baṅ· tlan·ḥ mahar·nava °o tcom· nut· °o paṅ· ṅam· lot· tloṅ· ḅa tduk·ḥ tdrak· tnir· dor·ḥ °o ḅaṁḥ °o pla plau ktoy· tiṁ ḅuḥ tCaḥ ḅaṁḥ ne mi la tiṁ ḅaḥ kduḥ mre hlau hlau na dra yaṁ
t k gaḥ tiṁ ya tiṁ hiṁ pa ma ḥ kni paṁ
ka ra Cu
ta ḅa doṃ mra ba ndlom· ba kca kkuṅ·ḥ tiṁ tḅak·ṁḥ knur· tiC·ṁ ṅam· kgam· tim·ṁ gaṃ °o plaṁḥ don·ḥ ṅaC· nū rom· ndlok· ḅay·ṁḥ °o pay·ṁḥ hṅam·ḥ pgoy· cetya thuva °o ñaḥ tiṁ hna dra mra kdaṅ· vo vaṅ·ṃ din·ṃṁ ksiḥ pir·ṁ mo din·ṃṁ kin·ṁ sba dit·ṃṁ ptu pliṁ ngam·ṃḥ kap·pa °o nhra nuC· tiṁ kvo kuḥ kuṅ·ḥ ḅnuḥ tiṁ gaṃ khi kha kṭlot· tiṁ kdit·ṁ pay·ṁḥ viṁ nguṃ tiṁ trat· °ap·brameya kgoy· tin·ṁ mat· kṭlik· tiṁ tgim·ṃṁḥ sīt·dha sīt·dha sīt·dha sādhu sādhu sādhu kliṁḥ kliṁḥ kliṁḥ .@

div.p: (in Burmese), 120-1 (15-16) and focused only on names and dates of the [Vikrama] kings mentioned in the inscription, but a complete study by Than Tun, Nyein Maung and San Win, with Romanized transliteration, was published in 11: 133 ff.. The inscription has been published again, with a revised transliteration, in 71-83. Re-edited here from published photographs and our team’s RTIs.
div.note: San Win 2000-1 is an English version of 1998. The complete reading furnished in the Document section of MHRJ 11, pp. 133ff., was probably done by Than Tun, Nyein Maung and San Win to whom the reading in Appendix to Tun Aung Chain's article in the same issue is ascribed.
